name: swiftui-developer-kit
description: Privacy-conscious SwiftUI, iOS, iPadOS, and macOS development workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, build, audit, and verify Apple-platform apps
interface.longDescription: Focused Codex workflows for SwiftUI architecture, accessibility, persistence, canvas interactions, diagnostics, release readiness, tests, and Xcode troubleshooting.
defaultPrompt: Audit my SwiftUI app and prioritize the most important fixes.
Plan a production-ready SwiftUI feature with tests and accessibility.
Review my iPad canvas implementation for reliability risks.
